data.description: 'It's like a ghost is driving the car!' Chinese tech firms are aiming to launch self-driving taxis in Europe over the next few years. 'Robotaxis' are already buzzing around some of China's biggest cities. But will they work in other countries?

data.title: FBS Global meets Nasdaq compliance after shares close above $1 for 10 straight days. Bid price matter resolved.
data.description: The company's ordinary shares have maintained a closing price above $1.00 for ten consecutive trading days, meeting the listing requirement set by Nasdaq. This achievement demonstrates the stock's consistency in trading above the crucial $1.00 mark over the specified period. This sustained performance indicates the company's potential compliance with Nasdaq's listing standards, reflecting positively on its market presence.

data.title: Ducommun (NYSE: DCO) will participate in Sidoti Small Cap Conference on March 18, 2026 with a 4:00 p.m. general presentation.
data.description: Costa Mesa, California - On March 4, 2026, Ducommun Incorporated (NYSE: DCO) revealed that Suman Mookerji, the senior vice president and chief financial officer, along with Christian Prezgay, senior director of financial planning and analysis and investor relations, will be engaging in the Sidoti Small Cap Conference on March 18, 2026. The event will feature a general presentation at 4:00 p.m. Eastern Time, with numerous one-on-one investor meetings planned throughout the day.

data.title: Finalist for Nurse.org award, Amesite's NurseMagic™ sees revenue growth, targets $800B post-acute market.
data.description: AMST has recently been acknowledged by a prominent online nursing community, which comes on the heels of significant revenue growth. The company is focusing on the post-acute market, which is anticipated to surpass $800 billion in value.

data.title: WeRide (Nasdaq: WRD) to disclose Q4 & full-year 2025 financials on March 23, 2026. Keep an eye out for updates.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, WeRide Inc., a prominent player in autonomous driving technology, revealed plans to disclose its unaudited financial performance for Q4 and the entire 2025 fiscal year on March 23, 2026, prior to the U.S. markets' opening. WeRide, traded as Nasdaq: WRD, stands as a global frontrunner in autonomous driving solutions.

data.title: Fleet electrification could save €246bn in operating costs by 2030, accelerating transport decarbonisation.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, a recent study by Eurelectric and EY revealed that the transition to electric fleets has the potential to generate approximately €246 billion in savings from operational costs by the year 2030. This analysis underscores the significant financial advantages associated with fleet electrification. Furthermore, when considering the broader system advantages, corporate fleets emerge as a pivotal tool in the efforts to reduce carbon emissions in the transportation sector.

data.title: Dr. Tyler Hulett Ph.D. joins Cancer Grand Challenges team led by Paul Bastard, receiving up to $25m over 5 years to address cancer avoidance.
data.description: A research team led by Paul Bastard from Institut Imagine has been granted up to $25 million over the course of around five years to tackle the issue of cancer prevention. The team, consisting of researchers from various disciplines worldwide, aims to address this challenge. The announcement was made in Baltimore on March 4, 2026. One of the co-investigators on the team is from CDI Labs.

data.title: Vision Marine showcases electric watersports at Miami Boat Show, aiming at retail expansion. The company, known for combining proprietary propulsion technology with multi-brand retail and service operations, aims to expand its retail ecosystem integration across Nautical Ventures. The news indicates their continued focus on innovation and growth in the marine industry.

(NASDAQ: VMAR) showcased sustained growth as a vertically integrated marine business uniting exclusive propulsion innovation with multiple brand retail and service facets. The company emphasized its commitment to progress in the marine industry.

This innovation enables Pass-Through Voting for millions of individual investors. This development aims to enhance investor options and promote shareholder participation.

data.title: FATF cautions about stablecoins as primary choice for evading sanctions via P2P transfers, urges nations to evaluate risks.
data.description: An international watchdog organization has highlighted concerns regarding Peer-to-Peer (P2P) stablecoin transactions conducted using self-custody wallets. They have warned that these transfers have the potential to circumvent Anti-Money Laundering (AML) checks. The organization is calling on countries to carefully evaluate the associated risks and implement appropriate safeguards. This advisory underlines the importance of monitoring P2P stablecoin transactions to prevent potential misuse and ensure compliance with AML regulations. It is crucial for authorities to address these vulnerabilities in the global financial system to maintain transparency and combat illicit financial activities effectively.

data.title: Red Cross volunteer force grows by 25%, now over 325,000 nationwide, as Gen Z drives surge in involvement.
data.description: More than 325,000 volunteers across the country are actively supporting a critical mission with deep roots in over half of the nation's 250-year legacy. Those interested in participating can learn more at redcross.org. Information from the American Red Cross shows a national overview with updated data, released today in Washington on March 4, 2026, through PRNewswire.

data.description: Today, in San Francisco on March 4, 2026, the Business Architecture Guild®, a global community of business architecture practitioners spanning across 100 countries, unveiled advancements in business architecture enablement. Key technology providers showcased innovations in next-generation business architecture solutions during the event.
